name: YNX Chain
description: YNX Chain is a Web4 Layer-1 ecosystem. Its currently documented public network is YNX Testnet, whose native Testnet asset is YNXT.
title: YNX Chain — Web4 Layer-1 Ecosystem
metaDescription: Learn what YNX Chain, YNX Web4, YNXT, and YNX Testnet are, with evidence-linked technical, security, economic, and risk disclosures.
disambiguation: YNX Chain is a Web4 Layer-1 ecosystem.
YNX Web4 is the application ecosystem powered by YNX Chain.
YNXT is the native Testnet asset.
YNX Testnet uses EVM Chain ID 6423.
YNX is not affiliated with unrelated Lynx-branded products.
features: Wallet, developer, explorer, payment, trust, resource, and application candidates
risks: YNX Testnet assets have no represented monetary value or guaranteed liquidity.
Mainnet launch, production signing, store distribution, third-party audits, and regulatory approval are not implied.
Product availability and public deployment differ by component and require component-specific evidence.
